Research

Applying machine learning to problems in cosmology and astrophysics — from parameter inference to simulation acceleration.

Featured 2025

CosmoMamba: State-Space Models for Cosmological Parameter Inference from 2D Field Maps

Independent Research

First application of selective state-space models (Mamba) to cosmological field analysis. CosmoMamba processes 256x256 field maps through multi-directional scans, achieving O(n) complexity. Benchmarked against CNNs and Vision Transformers on the CAMELS Multifield Dataset for predicting matter density (Omega_m) and fluctuation amplitude (sigma_8).

Mamba / SSMPyTorchCosmologyCAMELSVision
Zenodo (DOI) GitHub
Model Params R²(Ωm) R²(σ8) RMSE(Ωm) RMSE(σ8)
CNN 1.1M 0.993 0.978 0.010 0.018
ViT 10.9M 0.938 0.818 0.030 0.052
CosmoMamba 4.0M 0.936 0.886 0.030 0.041

CosmoMamba outperforms ViT on σ8 (R² = 0.886 vs 0.818) with 2.7x fewer parameters and O(n) complexity, and shows 30% less degradation in cross-suite transfer (IllustrisTNG → SIMBA).

2021–2022

Velocity Structure Function Analysis of AGN-Driven Turbulence

National Tsing Hua University, Taiwan — with Dr. Hsiang-Yi Karen Yang

Analyzed turbulence properties in the intracluster medium (ICM) from AGN simulation datasets. Computed velocity structure functions and characterized turbulence parameters using Python's YT Project, contributing to understanding how AGN feedback drives ICM dynamics.

AstrophysicsICMYT ProjectPythonTurbulence
2021

Neural Network Acceleration of N-body Cosmological Simulations

University of Hawaii

Developed a deep neural network in PyTorch trained on cosmological simulation snapshots to accelerate N-body simulations, reducing runtime by 50+ hours per dataset. Engineered a reverse displacement field algorithm that optimized computational resource usage by 40%.

PyTorchN-body SimulationsNeural EmulatorsCosmology
2022

Learning to Predict Cosmological Parameters Using Deep Learning

IIIT Nagpur — B.Tech Final Year Project

Extracted baryon density and dark matter density from Cosmic Microwave Background (CMB) maps using deep learning. Performed isotropy analysis of CMB data to test fundamental cosmological assumptions.

CMBDeep LearningCosmological ParametersPython
ResearchGate
